scripts.dev: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.setup: npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:frontend
scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && py -3.12 -m venv venv && venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install --upgrade pip && venv\Scripts\pip.exe install -r requirements.txt
